title: callista aurantiaca
intro: Callista aurantiaca, also known as the yellow shell orchid, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family of orchids. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista aurantiaca are attributed to its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and sore throats.
